title: Asmongold spends $7K on dental surgery during Twitch suspension, says he could “taste the rot”
summary_full: Asmongold revealed he spent $7,000 on dental surgery after a Twitch suspension in April 2026, stemming from severely rotting teeth. The streamer described tasting the decay while eating, prompting him to finally address the long-ignored health issue during his break. The treatment significantly improved his daily life and enjoyment of food.
